fields.title: Migrate editor/ - TauEditor with baked-in customizations
fields.description:
Create unified TauEditor that replaces editor-hub pattern.

## Source
- extensions/editor-hub/src/index.ts (HubEditor class)
- extensions/editor-hub/src/registry.ts (plugin registry - DELETE this pattern)

## Target
- extensions/tau/src/editor/index.ts

## Implementation
- TauEditor extends CustomEditor
- Direct function calls instead of plugin registry:
  - wrapEditorRender() from terminal-prompt
  - wrapAutocomplete() from skill-marker
  - afterInput() from skill-marker
- Takes TauState in constructor
- No Symbol.for globals, no runtime registration

## DoD
- TauEditor class created
- Compile-time composition (import functions directly)
- No editor-hub registry pattern
- Editor loads in pi without errors
fields.close_reason: Added TauEditor with compile-time composition (terminal-prompt render wrapper + skill-marker autocomplete hooks); no editor-hub registry
